summary: Phase 03 technically done; paused mid-item-registry-overhaul (user-requested polish pass). Awaiting playtest of sprite fixes + staff combat + seed planting.

completed_tasks.name: HitBox/CollisionBox split, F3 debug, collision overhaul, tools-as-hotbar refactor

Pickup_Items grid rewrite (14 cols, pairs crop+rotten), Food_Icons seed registration, 15 rotten item defs, Magic_Staff weapon, Leather_Boots sprite fix, ItemDrop multi-texture, brown tint removed, wilted-harvest drops rotten
CombatManager branches by active hotbar weapon: sword=LMB melee, staff=LMB fireball with per-weapon cooldown (1s staff). RMB fireball removed. HUD fireball indicator hidden when not cooling down.
CropManager.TryPlant accepts cropName; ToolController derives from active seed, consumes 1 on plant, clears hotbar ref when empty. InventoryManager.TryConsume added.
Pickup_Items has vertical gaps between bands: boot/staff moved from row 4 to row 5.
F2 grants Magic_Staff + Leather_Boots + Tomato_Seed alongside existing kit.

remaining_tasks.name: Verify Pickup_Items crops (rows 0-2) render correctly (user stated these 3 rows are contiguous); verify boot/staff on row 5
Put 3 different seeds in hotbar slots, plant each, confirm 3 distinct crops grow
Sword equipped: LMB melee; swap to Magic_Staff: LMB fireball 1s cooldown; HUD F indicator shows only during cooldown
Let crop wilt; harvest drops 1x {Crop}_Rotten and picks up to inventory
Commit the batch after playtest passes
Full CMB-01..CMB-06 playtest (carried from prior session)

human_actions_pending.context: Sprite grid rewrite, weapon-switch combat, per-seed planting, rotten drops — all land together, untested

decisions.decision: Pickup_Items.png has 1-row vertical gaps between content bands (rows 3, 6 are empty)
decisions.rationale: User corrected mid-session: sheet is not densely packed. Rows 0-2 contiguous crops, row 4 tree fruits, row 5 fish/boot/staff, row 7 wood/stars.

decisions.decision: Active hotbar weapon chooses action type (Stardew-style)
decisions.rationale: User: so pode atacar com 1 arma de cada vez. Flag spell in items.json Stats distinguishes staff from sword. Cooldown per-weapon via Stats.cooldown.

decisions.decision: Wilted harvest drops {Crop}_Rotten if rotten variant exists in registry
decisions.rationale: User wants rotten crops to yield low-value item. Convention: YieldItemName + _Rotten.

decisions.decision: Seed slot directly plants its crop (no more Tab cycling required)
decisions.rationale: Pre-existing bug: Tab-cycled selection ignored active seed. Fix derives crop name from seed id and consumes 1 unit on plant.

next_action: User runs game, presses F2, playtests: (1) sprite correctness rows 0-2 + boot/staff row 5, (2) different seeds plant different crops, (3) sword vs staff LMB, (4) wilted drops rotten. Then commit.
context_notes: Build clean (0 errors). Two mid-session bugs fixed: all seeds planted same crop (used Tab-cycled index), and F2 missed Magic_Staff. Then user reported Magic_Staff=banana sprite and Leather_Boots=fruit sprite — diagnosed as row miscount (gaps in sheet between content bands). Boot/staff moved row 4 -> row 5. Crops rows 0-2 assumed contiguous per user statement; if playtest shows crops shifted too, the gap theory extends further.
